'''yodadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:judgelike|judgelike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:judgelike|judgelike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yodadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodadithi|yodadithi]] || [[word:yodadiji|yodadiji]] || [[word:yodadishi|yodadishi]] || [[word:yodadiki|yodadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodaduthuthu|yodaduthuthu]] || [[word:yodadujuju|yodadujuju]] || [[word:yodadushushu|yodadushushu]] || [[word:yodadukuku|yodadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodaduthu|yodaduthu]] || [[word:yodaduju|yodaduju]] || [[word:yodadushu|yodadushu]] || [[word:yodaduku|yodaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodadufthuf|yodadufthuf]] || [[word:yodadufjuf|yodadufjuf]] || [[word:yodadufshuf|yodadufshuf]] || [[word:yodadufkuf|yodadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodadethe|yodadethe]] || [[word:yodadeje|yodadeje]] || [[word:yodadeshe|yodadeshe]] || [[word:yodadeke|yodadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodadothotho|yodadothotho]] || [[word:yodadojojo|yodadojojo]] || [[word:yodadoshosho|yodadoshosho]] || [[word:yodadokoko|yodadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodadotho|yodadotho]] || [[word:yodadojo|yodadojo]] || [[word:yodadosho|yodadosho]] || [[word:yodadoko|yodadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodadofthof|yodadofthof]] || [[word:yodadofjof|yodadofjof]] || [[word:yodadofshof|yodadofshof]] || [[word:yodadofkof|yodadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfthÃŸf|yodadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfjÃŸf|yodadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfshÃŸf|yodadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfkÃŸf|yodadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yodadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yodadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yodadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yodadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfthÃŸf|yodadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfjÃŸf|yodadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfshÃŸf|yodadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfkÃŸf|yodadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfthÃŸf|yodadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfjÃŸf|yodadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfshÃŸf|yodadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yodadÃŸfkÃŸf|yodadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodadÃḊthÃḊ|yodadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yodadÃḊjÃḊ|yodadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yodadÃḊshÃḊ|yodadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yodadÃḊkÃḊ|yodadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodadathatha|yodadathatha]] || [[word:yodadajaja|yodadajaja]] || [[word:yodadashasha|yodadashasha]] || [[word:yodadakaka|yodadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodadatha|yodadatha]] || [[word:yodadaja|yodadaja]] || [[word:yodadasha|yodadasha]] || [[word:yodadaka|yodadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodadafthaf|yodadafthaf]] || [[word:yodadafjaf|yodadafjaf]] || [[word:yodadafshaf|yodadafshaf]] || [[word:yodadafkaf|yodadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yodadasha|yodadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yodadshÃḋsha|yodadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yodadrosha|yodadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yodadmusha|yodadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yodadyasha|yodadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyodadnkshÃḋsha|goyodadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyodadnkrosha|goyodadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyodadnkmusha|goyodadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyodadnkyasha|goyodadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yodadadasha|yodadadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yodadadshÃḋsha|yodadadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yodadadrosha|yodadadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yodadadmusha|yodadadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yodadadyasha|yodadadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyodadadnkshÃḋsha|goyodadadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyodadadnkrosha|goyodadadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyodadadnkmusha|goyodadadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyodadadnkyasha|goyodadadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yedÃḊdasha|yedÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yedÃḊdshÃḋsha|yedÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yedÃḊdrosha|yedÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yedÃḊdmusha|yedÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yedÃḊdyasha|yedÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyedÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|goyedÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyedÃḊdnkrosha|goyedÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyedÃḊdnkmusha|goyedÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyedÃḊdnkyasha|goyedÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yodfadasha|yodfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yodfadshÃḋsha|yodfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yodfadrosha|yodfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yodfadmusha|yodfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yodfadyasha|yodfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyodfadnkshÃḋsha|goyodfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyodfadnkrosha|goyodfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyodfadnkmusha|goyodfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyodfadnkyasha|goyodfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
